title: AiMatrix
description: Disabled several functions that may lead to imbalanced advantages in vanilla Minecraft.
body:
A mod specifically designed for gunfight servers, but it is also compatible with **other servers**!

[Public Test Trailer for "AiMatrix" Server](https://www.bilibili.com/video/BV1CzanzFE81)

A. Disable certain features in vanilla version for non-OP players:
- Hide Interface (F1)
- Enable debug information (F3)
- Enable collision box (F3+B)
- Adjust the dark pulsation effect
- Spectator Highlight Input
- Perspective switching input (F5)
- Narrator, Voice -> Subtitles
- Custom Skin -> Cape/Left Hand.

B. Added the /random command to help datapack developers more easily get random numbers, enabling randomized game content.

C. Decorative elements such as copper grate and copper trapdoors were added.

---

专为枪战服务器开发的模组，但它同样适用于**其它服务器**！

[《射击矩阵》服务器公开测试宣传片](https://www.bilibili.com/video/BV1CzanzFE81)

A. 禁用非OP玩家的部分原版功能:

- 隐藏界面（F1）
- 打开调试信息（F3）
- 启用碰撞箱（F3+B）
- 调整黑暗脉动效果
- 旁观者高亮输入
- 视角切换输入（F5）
- 讲述人、声音->字幕
- 自定义皮肤->披风/左手。

B. 加入了/random指令，帮助数据包开发者更方便地调用随机数，以提供随机化的游戏内容。

C. 加入了装饰性的方块，比如铜格栅和铜活版门。
